title: Fix batch_embed ordering mismatch when None embeddings occur
description: Verify and fix bug in plexus/analysis/embedding_cache.py where batch_embed filters out None embeddings and can break input-output positional alignment used by VectorTopicMemory. Add tests to lock ordering behavior.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Confirmed defect in current code: batch_embed returns [r for r in result if r is not None], which can shrink output and break positional alignment. Implementing fix + tests now.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Fix implemented: batch_embed now validates miss-batch cardinality, fills result positions without compaction, and raises RuntimeError on unresolved slots to prevent positional corruption. Added regression test test_batch_embed_raises_when_model_returns_short_batch; embedding_cache_test.py now passes (18 passed).
